violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. At the time of inspection, the chemical sanitizer bucket was changed for new product. Dish machine was observed testing properly per test strips after switching sanitizer bucket. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Reduced Oxygen Packaged Salmon fillets were observed thawing in the walk-in cooler at 33, 37, and 39-40 degrees Fahrenheit in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Salmon fillet observed at 39-40 degrees Fahrenheit was voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish area dish machine. Per the PIC, test strips to be ordered same day. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar dish machine. Per the PIC, testing stickers/device to be ordered same day. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The condensate/melt from ice in the ice wells was observed to be draining onto the floor in the bar area. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the back kitchen and at the front kitchen area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Extra hand soap available at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The hand-washing sink in the front kitchen and the bar/server area was lacking paper towels. Extra paper towels available at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

At the time of inspection, cream cheeses prepared on site (Jalapeno and Garlic cream Cheeses) were observed to be held beyond 7 days of the prep date shown on the container. Cream cheeses were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The base of the door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

At the time of inspection, a clean cake piece slicer was observed hanging on the wall from a screw at a portion of wall with exposed/unsealed drywall. Cake slicer was moved for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

At the time of inspection, the scoop used for overnight oats was observed stored with the handle in the food. Scoop is to be stored with the handle out of the food to prevent possible contamination. Scoop was removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The condensate/melt from ice in the ice wells was observed to be draining onto the floor in the bar area. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
The receptacle in the employee toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

Then following areas of the physical facilities were observed to be in need of repair/adjustment... - Wall seams were observed to be missing seam covers/strips - A gap in FRP board near the walk-in cooler was observed exposing unsealed/uncovered drywall The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The floor/walls under and behind the dish machine in the back kitchen area were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement and back storage areas. Establishments shall be organized and kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The open air display case observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment to only use unit for shelf stable drinks/juices until the unit can be repaired/replaced/serviced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
The elderberry syrup was not approved to be from an approved source. Embargo of product lifted. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of item. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

Various items were observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit in a unit maintaining an ambient between 48-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Elderberry syrup labeled "REFRIGERATE" was observed held at 59 degrees at the time of the last inspection and was embargoed due to the unknown source. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of item. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in the unit 2 hours prior to inspection and moved to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Per person in charge, unit was serviced last Tuesday 8/15/23. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The glass flip top prep unit observed maintaining an ambient of 48-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Per person in charge, unit was serviced on Tuesday 8/15/23. Unit taken out of service until it can be serviced/replaced/repaired. 2) The open display case observed maintaining an ambient of 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Per person in charge, unit was serviced 8/15/23 and is pending another service visit. No TCS foods to be held in the unit until it can be serviced/repaired/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
Scrub brush was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

Elderberry syrup from an unknown source observed to be in the grab-n-go retail section of the establishment. Item embargoed at the time of visit until source can be properly identified by a licensed facility/entity. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use dish washer to wash/rinse then sanitize at 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

Eggs, salmon, and other items were observed held at 50-57 degrees Fahrenheit unit at the glass flip top prep unit maintaining an ambient of 55 degrees Fahrenheit at the cookline. Overnight oats and elderberry syrup observed at 50-59 degrees in the open display case that is maintaining an ambient of 58 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in the units under 2 hours prior to visit and were moved to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The glass flip top prep unit observed maintaining an ambient of 55 degrees Fahrenheit. 2) The open display case observed maintaining an ambient of 58 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
The ice well is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
